values.value: Sends in-app notifications (bell icon alerts) to Salesforce users

[ { "name": "recipientIds", "type": "array", "required": true, "help": "List of User IDs to send notifications to", "label": "Recipient IDs" }, { "name": "title", "type": "string", "required": true, "help": "Notification title", "label": "Title", "maxLength": 255 }, { "name": "body", "type": "string", "required": true, "help": "Notification body/message text", "label": "Body", "maxLength": 5000 }, { "name": "targetId", "type": "salesforce-id", "required": false, "help": "Optional: Record ID to link the notification to", "label": "Target ID" } ]
